text: This environment feels modern and sterile—a vivid contrast between technology and emptiness. The glass and clean lines evoke both curiosity and a faint sense of isolation. As I enter, the bold wall proclaims R+D: Responsive and rapidly evolving, but the text on the screen catches me. It speaks of confusion, blurred perception, and the ease with which clarity slips away. I feel a resonance with these words; despite the clinical orderliness, my mind drifts into abstraction, aware of how environments shape and challenge the limits of my understanding.
